architecture.summary: BlockID.au — Startup Navigation System (SCN: Validation → Position → Value → Direction → Capital). Next.js standalone + Supabase, zero-downtime deploys (immutable releases + port swap). C-Level AI agents (cto/cfo/cpo/cmo/cro/clo/chro/ciso/cdo/coo/rnd) self-research and self-upgrade their domain modules under src/lib/agents/.

history.note: CEO implementing-plan loop initialised — research → CEO decision → code → version/milestone/architecture.
